interfaces.name: Store
interfaces.doc:
An in-memory key/value store. `put`/`get` are fallible (the error seam); the
observers (`keys`/`count`/`contains`/`remove_all`) are synchronous +
infallible (a bare `T` return, no `Result`).

ops.name: open
ops.doc: Open a store with room for `capacity` entries.

ops.name: put
ops.doc:
Insert or replace `key` → `value`; returns the store's new size. Fails
when the store is at capacity and `key` is new.

ops.name: get
ops.doc:
Fetch the value for `key`. Fails (the reachable error path) when `key` is
absent.

ops.name: keys
ops.doc: Every key currently stored, in sorted order (infallible `list<string>`).

ops.name: removeAll
ops.doc:
Remove every key in `keys`; returns how many were actually removed
(infallible, `list<string>` IN + `int` out).

interfaces.name: Ticker
interfaces.doc:
A stateful ticker that fires registered listeners with an incrementing
counter. `on_tick` is a `Shape::Subscription` op — it REGISTERS a host
callback and hands back an owning `Subscription` handle whose
unsubscribe()/drop removes the listener; `tick` fires every live listener.
This is the callback + subscription slice's real C/C++ round-trip proof.

ops.name: new
ops.doc: Open a fresh ticker with no listeners and the counter at 0.

ops.name: on_tick
ops.doc:
Register `listener` to be called on every `tick`; returns a Subscription
handle that removes the listener when unsubscribed or dropped.

ops.name: tick
ops.doc:
Fire every live listener with the current counter value, then increment it
(infallible — registration/firing never fails).
